ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "promotional_code" TEXT /* Promotional code used for the order */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the customer */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed by the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Reward points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* SKU of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in the order */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variant */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipping belongs to */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., FedEx, USPS) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., size, color) */,
  "variant_value" TEXT /* Value of the variant (e.g., large, blue) */,
  "sku" TEXT /* SKU of the product variant */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product variant */,
  "inventory_quantity" INTEGER /* Inventory quantity of the product variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Last date the inventory was updated */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the warehouse */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_note" TEXT /* Additional notes about the status */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the return belongs to */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the order was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "return_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the return shipment */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of the refund (e.g., pending, issued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the return the refund belongs to */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was issued */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* Method of refund (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID of the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id")
)
